features.name: Project Init
features.description: testforge init creates a new project directory with standard structure (.testforge/config.yaml, inputs/, output/, evidence/, scripts/, cases/, analysis/)

features.name: Document Analysis
features.description: testforge analyze parses input documents (PDF, PPTX, DOCX, images, URLs) and extracts features, personas, and business rules using LLM

features.name: Test Case Generation
features.description: testforge generate creates functional test cases, use-case scenarios, and manual checklists from analysis results

features.name: Script Generation
features.description: testforge script generates Playwright browser test scripts from test cases

features.name: Test Execution
features.description: testforge run executes generated test scripts via shell/browser/HTTP connectors and collects evidence

features.name: Report Generation
features.description: testforge report generates markdown or HTML test reports from execution results

features.name: Manual QA Workflow
features.description: testforge manual start/check/progress/finish provides a structured checklist workflow for human testers

features.name: TUI Interface
features.description: testforge tui launches an interactive Textual-based terminal UI with dashboard, cases, runner, and manual screens

features.name: Self-Test Suite
features.description: testforge selftest runs built-in shell test scripts from tests/selftest/ to verify the installation

features.name: Multi-Project Management
features.description: testforge projects lists all TestForge projects found in the current directory

personas.name: QA Engineer
personas.description: Primary user who runs the full pipeline: analyze, generate, execute, and report on test results
pain_points: Manual test case writing is slow

personas.name: Developer
personas.description: User who extends TestForge with custom connectors, assertions, or integrations

rules.name: CLI Exit Codes
rules.description: CLI must exit 0 on success, non-zero on failure
rules.expected_behavior: Exit code 0 for success, 1 for failure

rules.name: Help Available
rules.description: All commands must show --help with usage information
rules.expected_behavior: Help text is displayed and exit 0

rules.name: Non-Interactive Mode
rules.description: --non-interactive (-y) flag must skip all confirmation prompts
rules.expected_behavior: No interactive prompts, auto-approve all confirmations
